send me the name and number of the guyu you brought to
my house phain"?

--- "Spector, Edward (Private Banking and Investment -
WFCB)" edward_spector@ml.com wrote:

Jeffrey,

As you know, I have a great deal of respect for you.
I have asked
around this afternoon after receiving your email on
a no name basis and
have been advised that I can have significant issues
approaching the
topic. I hope you understand. My apologies.

Best Regards,

Ed
Ed Spector, CIMA
Vice President
212 236 1660 (T)
212 236 1644 (F)

balances.

--- "Spector, Edward (Private Banking and Investment

WFCB)" edward_spector@ml.com wrote:

Jeffrey,

I just got back to the office in NY. Please
understand that as I
thought about our conversation the last couple of
days and two thoughts
hit me... first, that I do not know the gentleman
(no names) well enough
to approach him on this. He would look at me like
I
am nuts and would
ask what my interest is.. I know him only from a
business sense.
Also, as innocent as the request may sound, it
could
result in big
problems for me internally if this gentleman
doesn't
think its an
appropriate conversation. There is zero tolerance
in
the organization.

Best Regards,

Ed

Ed Spector, CIMA
Vice President
212 236 1660 (T)
212 236 1644 (F)
